scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @share-mem/shared && npm run build --workspace @share-mem/gateway && npm run build --workspace @share-mem/mcp-server && npm run build --workspace @share-mem/cli
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @share-mem/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @share-mem/gateway && npm run typecheck --workspace @share-mem/mcp-server && npm run typecheck --workspace @share-mem/cli
